description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a sloped terrain with a prominent retaining wall supporting the structure. The house features a flat roof and large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in light gray with darker accents on the roof and window frames, and there is a wooden deck or patio area extending from one side. The main entrance is accessible via a paved pathway that leads up from the lower ground level. The house is elevated on one side, creating a partially open space beneath the structure, likely for parking or storage. The landscaping consists of a grassy yard surrounding the house, blending the built environment with the natural slope.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden deck, set on a sloped grassy terrain with a retaining wall. The exterior is light gray with dark accents and features a partially elevated structure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's flat roof, large windows, and the wooden deck extending from the main structure, with the retaining wall and grassy slope visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the elevated portion of the house, the open space beneath, and the deck area, with the slope and retaining wall prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, the retaining wall supporting the house, and the deck area extending outward.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entryway, paved pathway, and the overall integration of the house with the sloped terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and no prominent porch or columns, blending into the sloped terrain.
